meta.title: LOCO Complex — Entertainment & Music Venue · District 1, Saigon
meta.description: LOCO Complex — NEWTRO entertainment complex at 11 Nam Quoc Cang, District 1, Saigon. 2-floor club + F&B. Tue – Sun, 6 PM. Book: 0866 433 745.

hero.heading: LOCO
hero.desc: An upscale entertainment destination in the heart of District 1. Two floors, two music worlds — one limitless experience.

about.heading: Where style meets energy
about.description: LOCO Complex is a NEWTRO entertainment complex — where elegance blends with youthful energy. Outdoor terrace, game zone, massage chairs, personal lockers — every detail crafted for the perfect experience.

music.heading: Each floor, each vibe
music.floor1Desc: A dynamic hip-hop space with professional DJs. B Tables, Standing, L-Zone Sofa, VIP and SVIP — from small groups to big parties.
music.floor1Tables: B Table (1-4 guests) · Standing · L-Zone Sofa (1-8) · VIP (1-10) · SVIP (1-12)
music.floor2Desc: Mini nightclub with top-tier sound & lighting. Top 40, EDM, House — where the night never ends.
music.floor2Tables: Standing (1-4 guests) · Premium Sofa (1-8) · VIP Sofa (1-15)

contact.heading: Book a Table
contact.note: Prices exclude 10% VAT and 10% service charge

menuPage.heading: Menu
menuPage.bitesDesc: Diverse menu served all night long.
menuPage.vipDesc: From 3.5 – 30 million VND depending on location and party size. Excludes 10% VAT and 10% service charge.
